# uptimekuma_notification_serwersms (Resource)

SerwerSMS notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_serwersms" "example" {
  name         = "SerwerSMS Notification"
  is_active    = true
  username     = "your_serwersms_username"
  password     = "your_serwersms_password"
  phone_number = "+48501234567"
  sender_name  = "YourCompany"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Notification name
- `password` (String, Sensitive) SerwerSMS account password
- `phone_number` (String) Recipient phone number
- `username` (String, Sensitive) SerwerSMS account username

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `sender_name` (String) Sender name or identifier

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
